itemListElement.reviewBody: My son completed  8 years in this school.school is ausome. My son study in school i am happy.

Read full review of me from different account Virendra.shingavi.

Read most replies by school authorities here ( review handler),  just want 5 stat rating and if any shows them mirror this handler arrogantly replies.

Minimum is required so giving one star...
Teachers aren't experienced or due to less exposure they are not able to deliver properly.

About school administration I have unforgettable experience of this during Covid time. These people must be recruited by bank recovery agency, good people's at wrong place. For general issues like Covid their approach & behaviour towards students and parents was very rude & careless.

All five start rating here is of school staff so don't fell in trap. In one line

Stay away ....

@RMD - Your answer is totally with false narrative & with misinformation, so here also you will be dragged with proofs. If you are talking about fees, my wife reached you twice to pay pending of earlier without asking any favour infact she paid some in April 21. She just wanted to request you for some additional time to pay first installment of 2021 but your staff didn't even shown courtesy to talk to her, and more humiliation came to us when she was kept waiting for few hours and then was told that officer is busy and can't meet. Me or my family did not ask any discount even if you failed in  fulfilling commitments due to Covid. I didn't use my religion for any deduction in fees not even I asked you any discount with advantage of Covid 19 lockdown. Another point which must get highlighted here that, you didn't allow ONLY MY KIDS on play ground, in fact any one could use it, your students or any paaseby. Even now your ground is used by ex students or any paaseby and it's used till late night by some unknowns which you can not control. So before showing finger to me and my kids do necessary home work. You can refer my mails and your replies. To save your wrong doing do not put any allegations. I can ask you to apologise me & my family for all your misbehaviour & wrong talks and most importantly trying to waste my kids academic year by your rudeness & humiliating behaviour, but I m just posting a true review using this facility provided by Google.

Very poor management. No principal since last 1 year. School management is very bad. Activity teachers and very bad, they don't know how to talk with small children. School only focus on admissions.
Teachers are not bother for course, Teachers are checking wrong copies.Some teachers are not professional, they don't have professionalism  and knowledge how should talk with child. I am very very unsatisfied and disappointed.

Rasiklal. M. Dhariwal International School is full of amenities and facilities. Staff is supportive. Proper guidance is provided to the students for enhancing their abilities. School also provides overall development programs for students. It's a perfect platform for shaping the perfect future of the child.
CBSE School, Very good infrastructure.. practical approach in teaching.. very supportive faculty. Excellent for overall development of child, in studies, sports and extra curricular activities
